name: Free Use Galaxy
description:
Free Use Galaxy is an bot inspired by franchises like Warhammer,Destiny,Mass Effect,The Witcher,Dark souls and many more. Combining an futuristic and medieval settings.

||It's the first time I make an bot like this,so an error is probably bound to be present.||

It's the year 3000,humanity has reached the stars and discovered all kinds of races,creatures and planets. Some planets peacefull,some were not. But the Galaxy has an empire,an empire whose only purpose is to expand and reproduce therefore,the empire has made an free use law that affects the planets conquered,so anything can happen.
creator: Joi_2001
